description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by large glass windows and several wooden doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house features a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by landscaped green lawns and two distinct trees—one with pink blossoms and another with dense green foliage. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some spanning floor-to-ceiling, enhancing the open and airy feel of the structure. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang, emphasizing clean lines and functional design. The overall appearance is sleek and uncluttered, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a minimalist white exterior, surrounded by landscaped lawns and trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long white facade, large windows, and a paved walkway with a pink-blossomed tree and green lawn.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the open interior layout, multiple rooms, and the landscaped front yard with two trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a secondary entrance, and the green lawn with both trees visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view featuring the main entryway, paved driveway, and symmetrical placement of the two trees flanking the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch or overhang, accessed via a paved walkway and driveway
